rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks within component type or implementation scopes as appropriate
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts and assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Only reference visible symbols in AGREE expressions; avoid AADL property names as variables
Declare constants and equations with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Use assign statements only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Equation declarations use 'eq name : type = expression;' syntax
Constant declarations use 'const name : type = value;' syntax
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties (Period, Deadline, etc.) directly as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their automatic scope in AGREE
